texto: Thank you.” I’ve said thank you thousands of times in my life. Most of the time I mean it to some degree. Now I think I need a new phrase because thank you is insufficient in this situation.

texto: A hug is a display of love that begins on the physical end of the spectrum but bleeds into the emotional end of the spectrum if you let it, if you give into it. It’s the most innocent, pure form of physical human connection there is. It only takes two willing people, who don’t even have to know each other, to participate. Two willing people who want that exchange. It’s so easy, but there are people who never get them. People who never get them,” she repeats softly, it’s a confession.
